name: Break-Even Units Calculator
desc: Break Even Units Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
seo_title: Break Even Units Calculator – Free Online Tool
seo_description: Calculate unidades, facturacion with our free break even units calculator. Just enter costos_fijos, precio_unitario, costo_variable and get results instantly.
example_label: Calculatete units needed: 50,000 fixed, 100 selling, 60 variable.
result_context: Sell units of {units} to break even, generating facturacion of {facturacion}. Each unit contribut is margen_contribucion of {margen_contribucion}.
formula_display: Break-even Units = Fixed Costs ÷ (Price - Variable Cost)
steps: {'step': 3, 'description': 'Round up to whole units', 'calculation': '364 units needed'}
mistakes: Not accounting for step-fixed costs that change at certain volumes
Assuming variable costs remain constant at all production levels
Forgetting that break-even doesn't include desired profit margin
